subcodes.first_line: The essence of praise and glorification befitteth the Lord of Names, Who through the hosts of remembrance and utterance hath adorned the cities of the hearts of men [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جوهر حمد و ثنا مالک اسما را لایق و سزا که بجنود ذکر و بیان مدائن قلوب اهل
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
